title: NCERT textbook controversy: Supreme Court recalls direction blacklisting three experts
description: The Supreme Court on Friday recalled its observations against three academicians, Professor Michel Danino, Suparna Diwakar and Alok Prasanna Kumar, who were recently censured by the Court for the contents of NCERT (National Council of Educational Research and Training) class 8 textbook chapter they drafted on corruption in judiciary.A Bench of Chief Justice of India Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul Pancholi modified its order of March 11 and deleted the direction which said that
